items.title: IBM: A Pivot To Hybrid Cloud And AI Makes It Attractive, But Overvalued
items.description: Get the latest on IBM's Q3 2025 performance, dividend outlook, and valuation insights. See here to know if IBM stock is a buy or hold.

items.title: Stocks to Watch Monday Recap: IBM, Boeing, Broadcom, CoreWeave
items.description: ↗️ Boeing (BA): The plane maker said Monday it had completed its long-awaited acquisition of Spirit AeroSystems. The stock rose 2.2%. ↗️ Confluent (CFLT): Tech stalwart IBM (IBM) is buying the data-infrastructure company for about $11 billion, confirming a Wall Street Journal report.

items.title: Is It Too Late to Chase the IBM-Driven Rally in Confluent Stock?
items.description: Confluent stock soars as IBM announces plans to buy the data streaming platform for $11 billion. Here’s why CFLT shares have little to no room for further upside in 2026.

items.title: These Stocks Moved the Most Today: Warner Bros., Paramount, Netflix, Tesla, CoreWeave, Confluent, Marvell, Carvana, and More
items.description: Warner Bros. Discovery stock jumps as Paramount Skydance launches a hostile bid, just days Warner Bros. reached a deal to be bought by Netflix. Paramount rises sharply and Netflix tumbles.
